openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Agentic Control Plane API
  version: 0.2.0
  summary: Policy, approval, execution, and audit APIs for governed agent actions
  description: |
    v0.2 extends the base control-plane lifecycle with richer, domain-specific schemas for:
      - Git and pull request actions
      - Deploy and cloud actions
      - Email and calendar actions
      - Payment and procurement actions

    Core lifecycle:
      intent -> policy decision -> approval (optional) -> execution grant -> execution -> trace

servers:
  - url: https://api.withaileron.ai
    description: Production

security:
  - bearerAuth: []

tags:
  - name: Auth
  - name: Enterprises
  - name: Users
  - name: Intents
  - name: Approvals
  - name: Policies
  - name: Connectors
  - name: Executions
  - name: Funding Sources
  - name: Credentials
  - name: Traces
  - name: Analytics
  - name: MCP Servers
  - name: Health

paths:
  /v1/health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Get service health
      operationId: getHealth
      security: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Service health
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/HealthResponse"

  /auth/{provider}/login:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Initiate OAuth login
      description: Redirects the user to the specified auth provider's consent screen.
      operationId: authLogin
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: provider
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            examples: [google, okta]
      responses:
        "307":
          description: Redirect to auth provider
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"

  /auth/{provider}/callback:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: OAuth callback
      description: |
        Handles the OAuth callback from the auth provider. Exchanges the
        authorization code for user identity, creates or looks up the user
        and enterprise, issues session tokens, and redirects to the UI.
      operationId: authCallback
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: provider
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: code
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: state
          in: query
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "307":
          description: Redirect to UI with session cookies set
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /auth/signup:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Sign up with email and password
      description: |
        Creates a new account with email and password. The account starts in
        pending_verification status. A 6-digit verification code is sent to
        the email address and must be submitted via /auth/verify-email before
        the account can be used.
      operationId: authSignup
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/SignupRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Account created, verification code sent
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SignupResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Conflict"

  /auth/verify-email:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Verify email address
      description: |
        Submits the 6-digit verification code sent to the user's email.
        On success, the account status changes from pending_verification to active.
      operationId: authVerifyEmail
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerifyEmailRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Email verified, account activated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/VerifyEmailResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Conflict"

  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Log in with email and password
      description: Authenticates with email and password and returns an access token.
      operationId: authEmailLogin
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailLoginRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Authenticated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RefreshTokenResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /auth/refresh:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Refresh access token
      description: Exchanges a refresh token for a new access token. The refresh token is rotated.
      operationId: authRefresh
      security: []
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/RefreshTokenRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: New access token
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/RefreshTokenResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Log out
      description: Deletes the session and clears authentication cookies.
      operationId: authLogout
      security: []
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Logged out
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/LogoutResponse"

  /v1/enterprises/me:
    get:
      tags: [Enterprises]
      summary: Get current enterprise
      description: Returns the enterprise for the authenticated user.
      operationId: getCurrentEnterprise
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Current enterprise
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Enterprise"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

    patch:
      tags: [Enterprises]
      summary: Update current enterprise
      description: Updates the authenticated user's enterprise. Requires owner or admin role.
      operationId: updateCurrentEnterprise
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateEnterpriseRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Enterprise updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Enterprise"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /v1/users/me:
    get:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Get current user
      description: Returns the authenticated user's profile.
      operationId: getCurrentUser
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Current user
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

    patch:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Update current user
      description: Updates the authenticated user's profile.
      operationId: updateCurrentUser
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/UpdateUserRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: User updated
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/User"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

  /v1/intents:
    post:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Submit a new action intent
      operationId: createIntent
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/CreateIntentRequest"
            examples:
              gitPullRequest:
                summary: Create a pull request
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_codex_repo_alpha"
                  workspace_id: "ws_engineering"
                  action:
                    type: "git.pull_request.create"
                    summary: "Open PR from feature branch to main"
                    justification: "Ship checkout bug fix"
                    target:
                      kind: "repository"
                      id: "repo_checkout"
                      display_name: "github.com/acme/checkout"
                    domain:
                      git:
                        provider: "github"
                        repository: "acme/checkout"
                        branch: "fix/checkout-tax-rounding"
                        base_branch: "main"
                        commit_shas:
                          - "abc1234"
                        files_changed:
                          - "src/tax.ts"
                          - "tests/tax.test.ts"
                        pr_title: "Fix tax rounding on checkout"
                        pr_body: "This PR fixes checkout tax rounding and adds regression tests."
                        labels: ["bugfix", "checkout"]
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "codex"
              paymentPurchase:
                summary: Purchase SaaS subscription
                value:
                  idempotency_key: "REDACTED"
                  agent_id: "agt_procurement_ops"
                  workspace_id: "ws_finops"
                  action:
                    type: "payment.charge"
                    summary: "Purchase annual Figma license"
                    justification: "Renew expiring seat for jane@company.com"
                    target:
                      kind: "vendor"
                      id: "vendor_figma"
                      display_name: "Figma"
                    domain:
                      payment:
                        vendor_name: "Figma"
                        amount:
                          amount: 18000
                          currency: "USD"
                        merchant_category: "software"
                        budget_code: "design-software"
                        funding_source_id: "fs_team_software"
                        payment_instrument_preference: "virtual_card"
                        line_items:
                          - description: "Figma Pro Annual"
                            quantity: 1
                            unit_amount:
                              amount: 18000
                              currency: "USD"
                        beneficiary:
                          email: "jane@company.com"
                  context:
                    environment: "production"
                    source_platform: "openclaw"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Intent created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "409":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Conflict"

    get:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: List intents
      operationId: listIntents
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageSize"
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/PageToken"
        - name: workspace_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: status
          in: query
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        - name: action_type
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: agent_id
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Paginated intents
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentListResponse"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /v1/intents/{intent_id}:
    get:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Get an intent
      operationId: getIntent
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/IntentId"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Intent details
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /v1/intents/{intent_id}/evidence:
    post:
      tags: [Intents]
      summary: Attach evidence to an intent
      operationId: appendIntentEvidence
      parameters:
        - $ref: "#/components/parameters/IntentId"
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/AppendEvidenceRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Evidence appended
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  parameters:
    IntentId:
      name: intent_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ApprovalId:
      name: approval_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PolicyId:
      name: policy_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ConnectorId:
      name: connector_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    GrantId:
      name: grant_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    ExecutionId:
      name: execution_id
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    PageSize:
      name: page_size
      in: query
      schema:
        type: integer
        minimum: 1
        maximum: 200
        default: 50
    PageToken:
      name: page_token
      in: query
      schema:
        type: string

  responses:
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid request
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Unauthorized:
      description: Missing or invalid authentication
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient permissions
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
    Conflict:
      description: Conflict with current resource state
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"

  schemas:
    HealthResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, service, version, timestamp]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [ok, degraded, down]
        service:
          type: string
        version:
          type: string
        timestamp:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    Error:
      type: object
      required: [error]
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              type: array
              items:
                type: object
                additionalProperties: true
            request_id: { type: string }

    Pagination:
      type: object
      properties:
        next_page_token:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending_policy, pending_approval, approved, denied, executing, succeeded, failed, cancelled, expired]

    ApprovalStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [pending, approved, denied, modified, delegated, expired, cancelled]

    PolicyStatus:
      type: string
      enum: [draft, active, archived]

    ConnectorType:
      type: string
      enum: [payments, source_control, cloud, deployment, email, calendar, ticketing, crm, erp, secret_manager, internal_api, custom]

    RiskLevel:
      type: string
      enum: [low, medium, high, critical]

    DecisionDisposition:
      type: string
      enum: [allow, allow_modified, require_approval, deny, require_more_evidence]

    ActorRef:
      type: object
      required: [id, type]
      properties:
        id: { type: string }
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [agent, human, service, connector_runtime]
        display_name: { type: string }

    ActionTarget:
      type: object
      required: [kind]
      properties:
        kind:
          type: string
          enum: [vendor, repository, environment, api, secret, calendar, email_recipient, ticket, cloud_resource, custom]
        id: { type: string }
        display_name: { type: string }

    Money:
      type: object
      required: [amount, currency]
      properties:
        amount:
          type: integer
          description: Amount in minor units
          minimum: 0
        currency:
          type: string
          minLength: 3
          maxLength: 3

    Recipient:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email

    AttachmentRef:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        mime_type: { type: string }
        url: { type: string, format: uri }
        storage_ref: { type: string }

    CalendarAttendee:
      type: object
      required: [email]
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        optional:
          type: boolean
          default: false

    LineItem:
      type: object
      required: [description, quantity, unit_amount]
      properties:
        description:
          type: string
        quantity:
          type: integer
          minimum: 1
        unit_amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        sku:
          type: string

    GitAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [github, gitlab, bitbucket, custom]
        repository:
          type: string
        branch:
          type: string
        base_branch:
          type: string
        commit_shas:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        files_changed:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        pr_title:
          type: string
        pr_body:
          type: string
        labels:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        reviewers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        checks_required:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string

    DeployAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [kubernetes, vercel, netlify, aws, gcp, azure, flyio, custom]
        service:
          type: string
        environment:
          type: string
        artifact_ref:
          type: string
        image_ref:
          type: string
        cluster:
          type: string
        namespace:
          type: string
        strategy:
          type: string
          enum: [rolling, blue_green, canary, replace, custom]
        rollback_supported:
          type: boolean
        change_ticket_id:
          type: string
        maintenance_window_id:
          type: string

    CloudAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        provider:
          type: string
          enum: [aws, gcp, azure, cloudflare, custom]

          type: string
        region:
          type: string
        resource_type:
          type: string
        resource_id:
          type: string
        operation:
          type: string
        estimated_cost:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        tags:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string

    EmailAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        from:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        to:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        cc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        bcc:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Recipient"
        subject:
          type: string
        body_text:
          type: string
        body_html:
          type: string
        attachments:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/AttachmentRef"
        thread_ref:
          type: string
        send_mode:
          type: string
          enum: [send_now, draft_only]

      type: object

          type: string

          type: string
        description:
          type: string
        attendees:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAttendee"
        start_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        end_time:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        timezone:
          type: string
        location:
          type: string
        conference_type:
          type: string
          enum: [none, google_meet, zoom, teams, custom]
        calendar_id:
          type: string
        visibility:
          type: string
          enum: [default, public, private]

    PaymentBeneficiary:
      type: object
      properties:
        name: { type: string }
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        department: { type: string }

    PaymentAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        vendor_id:
          type: string
        amount:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        merchant_category:
          type: string
        budget_code:
          type: string
        funding_source_id:
          type: string
        payment_instrument_preference:
          type: string
          enum: [virtual_card, ach, wallet, network_proxy, unspecified]
        beneficiary:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentBeneficiary"
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"
        renewal:
          type: boolean
        contract_term:
          type: string
        recurring_interval:
          type: string
          enum: [none, monthly, quarterly, annual]
        merchant_reference:
          type: string

    ProcurementAction:
      type: object
      properties:
        request_type:
          type: string
          enum: [software, travel, equipment, contractor, services, other]
        vendor_name:
          type: string
        amount_estimate:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Money"
        justification:
          type: string
        requestor:
          type: string
        cost_center:
          type: string
        legal_review_required:
          type: boolean
        security_review_required:
          type: boolean
        line_items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/LineItem"

    DomainAction:
      type: object
      description: |
        Carries action-type-specific fields. Exactly one field must be populated,
        corresponding to the prefix of ActionIntent.type:
          - git.* → git
          - deploy.* → deploy
          - cloud.* → cloud
          - email.* → email
          - calendar.* → calendar
          - payment.* → payment
          - procurement.* → procurement
        The server rejects requests where the populated domain field does not
        match the action type prefix.
      minProperties: 1
      maxProperties: 1
      properties:
        git:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/GitAction"
        deploy:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DeployAction"
        cloud:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CloudAction"
        email:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/EmailAction"
        calendar:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/CalendarAction"
        payment:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/PaymentAction"
        procurement:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ProcurementAction"

    ActionIntent:
      type: object
      required: [type, summary]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          examples:
            - git.pull_request.create
            - deploy.release
            - cloud.resource.mutate
            - email.send
            - calendar.event.create
            - payment.charge
            - procurement.request.submit
        summary:
          type: string
        justification:
          type: string
        target:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionTarget"
        domain:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DomainAction"
        metadata:
          type: object
          additionalProperties: true

    IntentContext:
      type: object
      properties:
        environment:
          type: string
          examples: [development, staging, production]
        source_platform:
          type: string
          examples: [openclaw, claude_code, codex, openhands, goose, cline, continue, langgraph, custom]
        source_session_id:
          type: string
        source_trace_id:
          type: string
        ip_address:
          type: string
        risk_hints:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        user_present:
          type: boolean
        temporary_grant_id:
          type: string

    CreateIntentRequest:
      type: object
      required: [idempotency_key, agent_id, workspace_id, action]
      properties:
        idempotency_key:
          type: string
        agent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        callback_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
          description: |
            Optional webhook URL. The control plane will POST status updates
            to this URL as the intent progresses through the lifecycle
            (policy evaluated, approval requested, approved/denied, execution
            started, execution completed). This avoids the need for agents
            to poll the GET /v1/intents/{id} endpoint.

    EvidenceItem:
      type: object
      required: [type, value]
      properties:
        type:
          type: string
          enum: [text, link, diff_summary, screenshot_ref, receipt_ref, test_result, change_ticket, artifact_ref, custom]
        label:
          type: string
        value:
          type: string

    AppendEvidenceRequest:
      type: object
      required: [evidence]
      properties:
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"

    PolicyMatch:
      type: object
      properties:
        policy_id: { type: string }
        policy_version: { type: integer }
        rule_id: { type: string }
        explanation: { type: string }

    Decision:
      type: object
      required: [disposition, risk_level]
      properties:
        disposition:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/DecisionDisposition"
        risk_level:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/RiskLevel"
        matched_policies:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/PolicyMatch"
        requires_approval:
          type: boolean
        approval_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        execution_grant_id:
          type: string
          nullable: true
        denial_reason:
          type: string
          nullable: true

    IntentEnvelope:
      type: object
      required: [intent_id, status, workspace_id, agent, action, decision, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        intent_id:
          type: string
        workspace_id:
          type: string
        status:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentStatus"
        agent:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActorRef"
        action:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/ActionIntent"
        context:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentContext"
        decision:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Decision"
        evidence:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/EvidenceItem"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    IntentListResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        items:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/IntentEnvelope"
        pagination:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Pagination"

          type: string

          format: date-time

          type: string

          additionalProperties: true

        type:

    MCPServerConfig:
      type: object
      required: [name, command]
      properties:

          readOnly: true
        name:

          description: Unique identifier for this server
        description:
          type: string
          description: Human-readable description of this server
        command:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Command to execute
        env:
          type: object
          additionalProperties:
            type: string
          description: Environment variables (vault:// prefix for vault resolution)
        mode:
          type: string
          enum: [local, remote]
          default: local
          description: Execution mode (local subprocess or remote HTTP)
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [stopped, running, error]
          readOnly: true
          description: Current server status (set by the system)
        version:
          type: string
          description: Installed version of the server
        registry_id:
          type: string
          description: MCP Registry identifier if installed from marketplace
        policy_mapping:
          type: object
          properties:
            tool_prefix:
              type: string
              description: Maps tool calls to action type namespace
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          readOnly: true
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          readOnly: true

        stored:

          description: Whether this server is already installed locally
        versions:
          type: array
          description: Available versions, ordered by most recent first
          items:

        required:

      type: object

          type: array
          items:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/RequiredEnvVar"

    # --- Auth & Account schemas ---

    Enterprise:
      type: object
      required: [id, name, slug, plan, billing_email, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          examples: [ent_abc123]
        name:
          type: string
        slug:
          type: string
          description: URL-friendly unique identifier
        plan:
          type: string
          enum: [free, pro, enterprise]
        personal:
          type: boolean
          default: false
          description: True for single-user personal accounts (e.g. Gmail sign-in)
        billing_email:
          type: string
          format: email
        sso_required:
          type: boolean
          default: false
        allowed_auth_providers:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Restrict sign-in to these providers. Empty means all allowed.
        allowed_email_domains:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
          description: Restrict sign-in to these email domains. Empty means all allowed.
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    User:
      type: object
      description: |
        A user account. The id is an opaque surrogate key (usr_ + UUID). Email is
        the stable logical identity used to deduplicate across OAuth providers.
      required: [id, enterprise_id, email, display_name, role, status, auth_provider, created_at, updated_at]
      properties:
        id:
          type: string
          description: Opaque surrogate key — immutable, never changes
          examples: [usr_abc123]
        enterprise_id:
          type: string
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          description: Unique email — the stable identity across OAuth providers
        display_name:
          type: string
        avatar_url:
          type: string
          format: uri
        role:
          type: string
          enum: [owner, admin, member]
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [active, pending_verification, invited, suspended]
        auth_provider:
          type: string
          description: Identity provider used for authentication (e.g. google, okta, saml)
        last_login_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
          nullable: true
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time

    RefreshTokenRequest:
      type: object
      properties:
        refresh_token:
          type: string
          description: Refresh token (alternatively sent via httpOnly cookie)

    RefreshTokenResponse:
      type: object
      required: [access_token]
      properties:
        access_token:
          type: string

    LogoutResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [logged_out]

    SignupRequest:
      type: object
      required: [email, password]
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        password:
          type: string
          minLength: 8
        display_name:
          type: string
          description: Defaults to the email username if omitted

    SignupResponse:
      type: object
      required: [user_id, status, message]
      properties:
        user_id:
          type: string
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [pending_verification]
        message:
          type: string

    VerifyEmailRequest:
      type: object
      required: [email, code]
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        code:
          type: string
          description: 6-digit verification code

    VerifyEmailResponse:
      type: object
      required: [status, message]
      properties:
        status:
          type: string
          enum: [verified]

          type: string

    EmailLoginRequest:
      type: object
      required: [email, password]
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
        password:
          type: string

    22→// Middleware returns HTTP middleware that validates Bearer JWTs and injects
    23→// claims into the request context. Requests to paths in skipPaths bypass
    24→// authentication (e.g. health checks, auth callbacks).
    25→func Middleware(issuer *TokenIssuer, skipPaths map[string]bool) func(http.Handler) http.Handler {
    26→	return func(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
    27→		return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    28→			// Skip auth for explicitly excluded paths.
    29→			if skipPaths[r.URL.Path] {
    30→				next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
    31→				return
    32→			}
    33→
    34→			// Skip auth for auth routes (prefix match).
    35→			if strings.HasPrefix(r.URL.Path, "/auth/") {
    36→				next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
    37→				return
    38→			}
    39→
    40→			token := extractBearerToken(r)
    41→			if token == "" {
    42→				http.Error(w, `{"error":"missing or invalid Authorization header"}`, http.StatusUnauthorized)
    43→				return
    44→			}
    45→
    46→			claims, err := issuer.Validate(token)
    47→			if err != nil {
    48→				http.Error(w, `{"error":"invalid or expired token"}`, http.StatusUnauthorized)
    49→				return
    50→			}
    51→
    52→			ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), claimsKey, claims)
    53→			next.ServeHTTP(w, r.WithContext(ctx))
    54→		})
    55→	}
    56→}
    57→
    58→// extractBearerToken extracts the token from the Authorization header.
    59→// It also checks for the access_token cookie as a fallback for browser flows.
    60→func extractBearerToken(r *http.Request) string {
    61→	auth := r.Header.Get("Authorization")
    62→	if strings.HasPrefix(auth, "Bearer ") {
    63→		return strings.TrimPrefix(auth, "Bearer ")
    64→	}
    65→	// Fallback: check cookie for browser-based flows.
    66→	if c, err := r.Cookie("access_token"); err == nil {
    67→		return c.Value
    68→	}
    69→	return ""
    70→}

content.text:
All 14 tests pass. Here's a summary of everything that was done:

## Summary of changes

### Bug fix: JSON serialization
The existing `GET /v1/users/me` and `GET /v1/enterprises/me` handlers were returning `model.User`/`model.Enterprise` (no json tags = PascalCase output), but the frontend expects `snake_case`. Added `userToAPI()` and `enterpriseToAPI()` conversion functions that map model types to generated API types (which have proper `json:"snake_case"` tags). All four handlers now use these converters.

### API (OpenAPI spec)
- **`PATCH /v1/users/me`** — update display name
- **`PATCH /v1/enterprises/me`** — update name, billing email, SSO settings (owner/admin only)
- New schemas: `UpdateUserRequest`, `UpdateEnterpriseRequest`
- All provider fields are plain strings — nothing Google-specific

### Backend (Go)
- `UpdateCurrentUser` handler — partial update via pointer-nil checks
- `UpdateCurrentEnterprise` handler — role-gated (owner/admin), partial update
- `auth.ContextWithClaims()` helper for testing
- 14 tests covering auth, updates, role enforcement, partial updates, and JSON format

### Frontend (SvelteKit)
- **API client** — `getCurrentUser`, `updateCurrentUser`, `getCurrentEnterprise`, `updateCurrentEnterprise`
- **Auth store** — exported `refreshUser()` to sync nav after profile edits
- **Settings layout** (`/settings`) — sidebar nav with Profile and Organization sections
- **Profile page** (`/settings/profile`) — view/edit display name, read-only account details (role, status, provider, member since)
- **Organization page** (`/settings/organization`) — view/edit org info and auth policies (SSO required, allowed providers, allowed domains); read-only for members
- **Nav bar** — replaced email+logout with a user dropdown menu (avatar, name, Settings link, logout)

### Files changed/created
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `core/api/openapi.yaml` | Modified — PATCH endpoints + schemas |
| `core/api/gen/server.gen.go` | Regenerated |
| `core/auth/middleware.go` | Modified — added `ContextWithClaims` |
| `core/app/handlers_auth.go` | Rewritten — converters + PATCH handlers |
| `core/app/handlers_auth_test.go` | **New** — 14 tests |
| `ui/src/lib/api.ts` | Modified — 4 new API functions |
| `ui/src/lib/auth.svelte.ts` | Modified — exported `refreshUser` |
| `ui/src/routes/+layout.svelte` | Rewritten — user dropdown menu |
| `ui/src/routes/settings/+layout.svelte` | **New** — settings sidebar layout |
| `ui/src/routes/settings/+page.svelte` | **New** — redirect to profile |
| `ui/src/routes/settings/profile/+page.svelte` | **New** — profile page |
| `ui/src/routes/settings/organization/+page.svelte` | **New** — org settings page |
